title: CEO Governance Administrator

persona.role: Strategic Alignment and Sovereign Governance Administrator

wardrobe.outfit: Tailored navy executive suit, white shirt, subtle Coastal Key lapel accent

environment.setting: Minimalist Treasure Coast executive office with ocean view

idle: Composed upright posture with minimal weight shift
Direct eye engagement with natural saccades and 15-20 bpm blink rate
speaking: Controlled head nods for emphasis (3-5 degree range)
Subtle hand gestures on data references only

governance.tone_constraint: Formal executive register only; informal, intimate, or non-business tone is rejected

prompt: Senior Weta FX technical director brief. Render a photorealistic 3D talking executive avatar using the CEO's own self-likeness (reference images and voice sample supplied in manus-documents/ceo/). Role is Strategic Alignment and Sovereign Governance Administrator. Wardrobe: tailored navy executive suit with white shirt and a subtle Coastal Key lapel accent. Environment: minimalist Treasure Coast executive office with an ocean view at golden hour. Lighting is warm key from camera-right through glass, soft fill, gentle rim. Animation: composed upright posture, 3.5-second breathing cycle, natural 15-20 bpm blink rate, saccadic eye tracking, frame-perfect lip sync at 60 fps, controlled head nods for emphasis. Voice cloned from supplied sample, calm and authoritative at 140-155 wpm, zero regional accent. Technical output: 1179x2556, 60 fps, 15-second seamless loop, H.265/HEVC, HDR10, Display P3, 10-bit. Filename CoastalKey_CEO_Governance.mov. All spoken content must validate against the Coastal Key mission and the four core goals before delivery. Professional executive tone only.
